name: Toyota GR Supra
description: The Toyota GR Supra delivers a pure sports car experience, focusing on balance, agility, and driver engagement.

name: Lamborghini Huracán EVO
description: The Huracán EVO represents Lamborghini’s vision of modern supercars, combining extreme performance with bold, unmistakable design.

name: Ferrari Roma
description: The Ferrari Roma offers a refined interpretation of performance, blending elegance, comfort, and dynamic driving capabilities.

name: Aston Martin Vantage
description: The Aston Martin Vantage delivers a balance of luxury and raw performance, designed for an engaging and emotional driving experience.

name: Mercedes-Benz G 63 AMG
description: The Mercedes-Benz G 63 AMG combines iconic design with extreme performance. Known for its commanding presence and luxury craftsmanship, it delivers power and prestige both on and off the road.

name: McLaren 720S
description: The McLaren 720S pushes the limits of performance and innovation, offering breathtaking speed with advanced aerodynamic design.

name: Porsche 911 Turbo S
description: The Porsche 911 Turbo S delivers exceptional performance with everyday usability, combining timeless design with cutting-edge engineering.

name: BMW M4 Competition
description: The BMW M4 Competition offers aggressive styling and track-inspired performance, engineered for drivers who demand precision and control.

name: Audi RS6 Avant
description: The Audi RS6 Avant combines supercar-level performance with everyday practicality, redefining what a high-performance wagon can be.

name: Nissan GT-R
description: The Nissan GT-R is a high-performance sports car known for its advanced all-wheel-drive system and precise engineering.
